name: io.github.richardofortune/tyrekick
description: Read and resolve human feedback pinned on your live prototype, straight from your coding agent.

environmentVariables.name: TYREKICK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your deployed Tyrekick feedback worker (e.g. https://tyrekick-feedback.you.workers.dev)

environmentVariables.name: TYREKICK_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the worker's management routes (set via `wrangler secret put TYREKICK_TOKEN`)
